title: Flexible Print Info Function
description: Write a function called print_info that accepts any number of positional arguments via *args and any number of keyword arguments via **kwargs. For each positional argument, print 'arg: {value}'. For each keyword argument, print '{key}: {value}'. Then call print_info with positional arguments 'hello' and 'world', and keyword arguments name='Python' and version=3.
expected_output:
arg: hello
arg: world
name: Python
version: 3
hints: Use for arg in args: to loop through positional arguments
Use for key, value in kwargs.items(): to loop through keyword arguments
The function call is already provided — just fill in the function body to print each item

code_requirements.fail_message: Your function must use *args to accept variable positional arguments.
Your function must use **kwargs to accept variable keyword arguments.

tests.expected_output:
arg: hello
arg: world
name: Python
version: 3
